attributes.action: Overhaul the UK driving test system to ensure fair access to local test centres.
attributes.additional_details: An unprecedented number of learner drivers are competing for too few tests, often having to turn to third-party resellers. Availability is so limited that many remain stuck in the system indefinitely, without a fair chance to pass their driving test.
attributes.background: Review the driving test booking system to ensure learners can book tests at their local centres within a reasonable timeframe, and prevent third parties from bulk-booking and reselling tests at inflated prices.

rejection.details:
Review the driving test booking process, ban resales at inflated prices & bots

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/736594
